Module com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core

Package com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Factory<T>
    Creates and destroys a value.
    Reference<T>
    A reference to a value.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ConcurrentChildScopes
    Graceful shutdown of child scopes from a parent scope that requires thread-safety.
    ConcurrentLazyFactory<T>
    A thread-safe factory that initializes a value on demand.
    ConcurrentLazyReference<T>
    A thread-safe reference that initializes a value on demand.
    ConstantReference<T>
    A Reference that returns a pre-existing value.
    LazyFactory<T>
    A factory that initializes a value on demand.
    LazyReference<T>
    A reference that initializes a value on demand.
    Scopes
    Scope helper functions.
